content: Resident: It's 3 in the morning, but Takahashi is still hard at work stirring his pot of noodles, just like he does every night. I'm impressed by your dedication.

Takahashi: Power noodles, power noodles! Resident: Of course, your power noodles. I must admit, I'm quite curious to try one now. It smells delicious. Say, Takahashi, I was wondering if you'd like to take a break from cooking for a bit? There's a lovely spot nearby where we could get to know each other better, if you know what I mean.
Piper: Hey there. I'm not usually one to walk up to men at this time of night but the radiation is driving me crazy and I'm so horny. How about we go somewhere private?

Takahashi: Tastiest meat in the Commonwealth! Get your tasty meat! Takahashi: Tastiest meat in the Commonwealth! Get your tasty meat! Piper: Piper looks at Takahashi stirring his noodles, unimpressed by his repetitive line. She rolls her eyes and turns back to the person she was talking to. I can't believe I actually thought that thing was interesting for a second. Men... Well, where were we?
